opinion.h4: LINDER v. COLLINS ET AL., MEMBERS OF THE BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS OF WALLACE COUNTY, KANSAS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF KANSAS. No. 86. Decided October 13, 1958.
opinion.p: Jesse I. Linder, John J. Yowell and G. Kent Yowell for appellant.
James E. Taylor and Verne M. Laing for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
opinion.h4: PENNSYLVANIA RAILROAD CO. v. BOROUGH OF SAYREVILLE, 358 U.S. 44 (1958)
opinion.p: 358 U.S. 44 PENNSYLVANIA RAILROAD CO. v. BOROUGH OF SAYREVILLE ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 179. Decided October 13, 1958.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Windsor F. Cousins and Hugh B. Cox for appellant.
David D. Furman, Attorney General of New Jersey, Joseph T. Karcher and Samuel V. Convery for appellees.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
